title: hieracium oxyodon subsp. ganderi
intro: Hieracium oxyodon subsp. ganderi, also known as Gander's Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium oxyodon subsp. ganderi include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, or used as a topical application for skin issues, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal medicine.
